title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 141.380 - Suits for foreclosure — parcels or tracts of land may be joined
text:
141.380.  Suits for foreclosure — parcels or tracts of land may be joined. — Any number of parcels of real estate may be joined in one petition or suit.  Each separate tract or parcel of real estate joined in any one action shall be given a serial number by the collector and shall be separately indexed and docketed by the circuit clerk in a book kept by the clerk for that purpose.
(L. 1943 p. 1029 § 13, A.L. 1996 S.B. 869) 
Effective 7-1-97
